mapper.select:
SELECT pv.project_id AS "projectId", t.test_id AS "testId", t.title AS "testTitle", t.version_id AS "versionId", pv.version_name AS "versionName", t.team_name AS "teamName",
t.status_code AS "statusCode", CASE t.status_code WHEN 'a001' THEN '예정' WHEN 'a002' THEN '진행중' WHEN 'a003' THEN '종료' ELSE t.status_code END AS "statusName",
t.priority_code AS "priorityCode", CASE t.priority_code WHEN 'c001' THEN '상' WHEN 'c002' THEN '중' WHEN 'c003' THEN '하' ELSE t.priority_code END AS "priorityName",
t.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", CASE t.test_type_code WHEN 'd001' THEN '기능' WHEN 'd002' THEN 'UI/UX' WHEN 'd003' THEN '성능' WHEN 'd004' THEN '보안' WHEN 'd005' THEN '데이터' WHEN 'd006' THEN '기타' ELSE t.test_type_code END AS "testTypeName",
t.assignee_id AS "assigneeId", assignee.user_name AS "assigneeName",
t.created_by AS "createdBy", creator.user_name AS "createdByName",
t.description AS "description", TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", TO_CHAR(t.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "createdAt", TO_CHAR(t.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "updatedAt"
FROM test t JOIN project_version pv ON t.version_id = pv.version_id LEFT JOIN users assignee ON t.assignee_id = assignee.user_id LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.user_id
WHERE t.test_id = #{testId} AND pv.project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT execution_id FROM ( SELECT execution_id FROM test_execution WHERE mapping_id = #{mappingId} ORDER BY executed_at DESC, created_at DESC, execution_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

WITH latest_execution AS ( SELECT execution_id, mapping_id, executor_id, result_status_code, execution_comment, retry_no, executed_at FROM ( SELECT te.execution_id, te.mapping_id, te.executor_id, te.result_status_code, te.execution_comment, te.retry_no, te.executed_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY te.mapping_id ORDER BY te.retry_no DESC, te.executed_at DESC, te.created_at DESC, te.execution_id DESC ) AS rn FROM test_execution te ) WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT tcm.mapping_id AS "mappingId", tcm.test_id AS "testId", tcm.sort_order AS "sortOrder",
tc.test_case_id AS "testCaseId", tc.title AS "testCaseTitle",
tc.test_type_code AS "testCaseTypeCode", CASE tc.test_type_code WHEN 'd001' THEN '기능' WHEN 'd002' THEN 'UI/UX' WHEN 'd003' THEN '성능' WHEN 'd004' THEN '보안' WHEN 'd005' THEN '데이터' WHEN 'd006' THEN '기타' ELSE tc.test_type_code END AS "testCaseTypeName",
tc.priority_code AS "testCasePriorityCode", CASE tc.priority_code WHEN 'c001' THEN '상' WHEN 'c002' THEN '중' WHEN 'c003' THEN '하' ELSE tc.priority_code END AS "testCasePriorityName",
tc.pre_condition AS "preCondition", tc.expected_result AS "expectedResult",
le.execution_id AS "executionId", le.executor_id AS "executorId", executor.user_name AS "executorName",
NVL(le.result_status_code, 'o001') AS "resultStatusCode", CASE NVL(le.result_status_code, 'o001') WHEN 'o001' THEN '미수행' WHEN 'o002' THEN '진행중' WHEN 'o003' THEN '성공' WHEN 'o004' THEN '실패' ELSE NVL(le.result_status_code, 'o001') END AS "resultStatusName",
le.execution_comment AS "executionComment", NVL(le.retry_no, -1) AS "retryNo", NVL(le.retry_no + 1, 0) AS "nextRetryNo", TO_CHAR(le.executed_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "executedAt"
FROM test_case_mapping tcm JOIN test_case tc ON tcm.test_case_id = tc.test_case_id LEFT JOIN latest_execution le ON tcm.mapping_id = le.mapping_id LEFT JOIN users executor ON le.executor_id = executor.user_id
WHERE tcm.test_id = #{testId}
ORDER BY tcm.sort_order ASC
SELECT NVL(MAX(retry_no) + 1, 0) FROM test_execution WHERE mapping_id = #{mappingId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'EXEC_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(execution_id, -4))) + 1 FROM test_execution WHERE execution_id LIKE 'EXEC_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 1), 4, '0' ) FROM dual
INSERT INTO test_execution ( execution_id, mapping_id, executor_id, result_status_code, execution_comment, retry_no, executed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{executionId}, #{mappingId}, #{executorId}, NVL(#{resultStatusCode}, 'o001'), #{executionComment}, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO test_execution ( execution_id, mapping_id, executor_id, result_status_code, execution_comment, retry_no, executed_at, created_at ) WITH input_data AS (
SELECT #{index} AS ord, #{mappingId} AS mapping_id, #{resultStatusCodeList[${index}]} AS result_status_code, #{executionCommentList[${index}]} AS execution_comment FROM dual
), current_max AS ( SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(execution_id, -4))), 0) AS max_no FROM test_execution WHERE execution_id LIKE 'EXEC_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), retry_data AS ( SELECT mapping_id, NVL(MAX(retry_no) + 1, 0) AS next_retry_no FROM test_execution WHERE mapping_id IN ( SELECT mapping_id FROM input_data ) GROUP BY mapping_id ) SELECT 'EXEC_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( current_max.max_no + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY input_data.ord), 4, '0' ) AS execution_id,
input_data.mapping_id AS mapping_id, #{executorId} AS executor_id,
NVL(input_data.result_status_code, 'o001') AS result_status_code, input_data.execution_comment AS execution_comment,
NVL(retry_data.next_retry_no, 0) AS retry_no,
SYSDATE AS executed_at, SYSDATE AS created_at
FROM input_data CROSS JOIN current_max LEFT JOIN retry_data ON input_data.mapping_id = retry_data.mapping_id
mapper.update: UPDATE test_execution SET executor_id = #{executorId}, result_status_code = NVL(#{resultStatusCode}, 'o001'), execution_comment = #{executionComment}, executed_at = SYSDATE WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}
